revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:御幣, en:Gohei); add local discussion section + dated import note

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Gohei here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Gohei for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/8589549 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:御幣 | revid=8589549 --> 道真の「このたびは」の「幣」は、（今日の意味の）御幣というより[[幣帛]]のことではないかと思うのですが。[[User:Nnh|nnh]] 2006年11月1日 (水) 14:00 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1200785106 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Gohei | revid=1200785106 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Japan|myth=|shinto=yes|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Religion|importance=mid}} }}
